name: pytest-bdd
description: Pytest plugin implementing a subset of the Gherkin language, enabling behavior-driven development tests alongside regular pytest tests without extra runners.

seo.title: pytest-bdd — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: pytest-bdd: Pytest plugin implementing a subset of the Gherkin language, enabling behavior-driven development tests alongside regular pytest tests without extra

when_to_use: Gherkin scenarios executed natively within pytest
Mix BDD scenarios with regular pytest tests in one run
Step reuse across feature files via shared step modules
Parametrize BDD scenarios with example table data

pros: Gherkin syntax inside pytest, no second runner
Reuses pytest fixtures in step definitions
cons: Gherkin parsing less complete than Cucumber
Less expressive than behave for pure BDD
Limited IDE support vs full Cucumber tooling
review.verdict: A pragmatic BDD option when your team already lives in pytest and does not want a second test runner.
review.best_for: pytest shops needing Gherkin for stakeholder-readable acceptance tests
review.not_for: Teams doing strict BDD where Cucumber's tooling ecosystem matters more
